property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\dotnet\;"%CLASSPATH%;C:\JUNIT\junit4.10.jar;.;";C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Maven\apache-maven-3.8.8-bin\apache-maven-3.8.8 in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;%NVM_HOME%;%NVM_SYMLINK%;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-11;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\TestProject Agent;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Maven\apache-maven-3.8.8-bin\apache-maven-3.8.8 in;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local
vm;C:
vm4w
odejs;C:\Users\DELL\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity in;.

testcase.name: search_With_Title
testcase.system-out: INFO: Entered username INFO: Entered password INFO: submit button clicked INFO: Home page loaded INFO: *****search with title***** INFO: title checkbox checked INFO: content search checkbox unchecked INFO: one word entered INFO: search button clicked INFO: Keyword highlighted/visible successfully.

testcase.name: search_With_Content
testcase.system-out: INFO: *****search with content***** INFO: title search checkbox unchecked INFO: content search checkbox checked INFO: two words entered INFO: search button clicked INFO: Keyword highlighted/visible successfully.

testcase.name: search_With_Title_And_Content
testcase.system-out: INFO: *****search with title and content***** INFO: title search checkbox checked INFO: content search checkbox checked INFO: keyword entered INFO: search button clicked INFO: Keyword highlighted/visible successfully.

testcase.name: search_With_Title_And_Content_Using_AND_Operation
testcase.system-out: INFO: *****search with title and content using AND operation***** INFO: title search checkbox checked INFO: content search checkbox checked INFO: AND search checkbox checked INFO: OR search checkbox unchecked INFO: keyword entered INFO: search button clicked INFO: Keyword highlighted/visible successfully.

testcase.name: search_With_Title_And_Content_Using_OR_Operation
testcase.system-out: INFO: *****search with title and content using OR operation***** INFO: title search checkbox checked INFO: content search checkbox checked INFO: OR search checkbox checked INFO: AND search checkbox unchecked INFO: keyword entered INFO: search button clicked INFO: Keyword highlighted/visible successfully.

testcase.name: search_Within_Category_Using_Title
